welcome.newUserDescription: Agents with the UX they deserve. Connect anything. Organize your sessions. Everything you need to do the work of your life!
welcome.existingUserDescription: Update your API connection or change your setup.

apiSetup.title: Set Up API Connection

apiSetup.claudeDescription: Use your Claude subscription for unlimited access.

credentials.authorizationCodeDescription: Copy the code from the browser page and paste it below.
credentials.connectClaudeDescription: Use your Claude subscription to power multi-agent workflows.

completion.completeDescription: Just start a chat and get to work.
